creator: villa.alberto@gmail.com
text:
i've read that using git directly into a port is not a good habit: here's a 
final version with a distfile, and here's the distfile: 
http://kdenlive.org/~freebsd/kopete-facebook-0.1.5.tar.gz (i can't host it 
there, so i would need it hosted on the freebsd server, if possible)
-- 
Alberto Villa <villa.alberto@gmail.com>
http://wiki.FreeBSD.org/AlbertoVilla

Some people cause happiness wherever they go; others, whenever they go.
